backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that manages solar installation leads stored in a map keyed by email, exposing methods to submit, delete, retrieve, and list all leads sorted by name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: scroll-triggered animations for OdishaGuide.tsx, adding an office address to the Footer, and adding a 'Service Area: Odisha' entry to the Footer.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes in each component, hook, and style file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'TRI-GITA SERVICES' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all page sections in order, including Header, Hero, SchemeInfo, OdishaGuide, WhyChooseUs, WarrantyGuarantee, Services, InquiryForm, BankFinanceBanner, WhatsAppSection, Footer, and a FloatingWhatsAppButton.
frontend/src/components/BankFinanceBanne: Full-width promotional banner for bank financing that uses IntersectionObserver to trigger fade/slide-in entrance animations, a shimmer overlay, staggered stat cards, and a WhatsApp CTA button, all with prefers-reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section component (content truncated/empty in provided source) intended to display company contact information.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: Fixed floating action button in the bottom-right corner that links to the company's WhatsApp, with a tooltip and hover scale animation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Two-column footer displaying brand identity, operating hours, and contact details including phone numbers, email, office address (Shri Hari Niwas, Sambalpur), and a 'Service Area: Odisha' entry with matching icon styling.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, smooth-scroll nav links, a phone call link, a WhatsApp CTA button, and a responsive hamburger menu for mobile.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-viewport hero section with a background solar image, headline, tagline, and CTA buttons linking to WhatsApp and the inquiry form section.
frontend/src/components/InquiryForm.tsx: Lead-capture form that collects name, phone, email, city, system size, and message, validates inputs, then opens a pre-filled WhatsApp message to the business number.
frontend/src/components/OdishaGuide.tsx: Step-by-step guide component for the PM Surya Ghar scheme in Odisha, displaying four installation phases, subsidy tiers, eligibility criteria, required documents, and DISCOM list with an intersection-observer-triggered animation.
frontend/src/components/SchemeInfo.tsx: Informational section explaining the PM Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana, listing key benefits, eligibility criteria, and a four-step process from consultation to subsidy disbursement.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Renders a 'Services' section with two cards (Domestic and Commercial solar installation), each showing an image, feature list, and a CTA button that smooth-scrolls to the contact section.
frontend/src/components/WarrantyGuarante: Displays a dark-themed 'Warranty & Guarantee' section with three cards covering 25-year panel warranty, 10-year inverter warranty, and 5-year free service guarantee.
Renders a WhatsApp contact section with a styled card linking to a specific WhatsApp number, encouraging users to chat with solar experts.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Displays a 'Why Choose Us' section with three benefit cards (Registered Vendor, Technical Expertise, Hassle-Free Process) highlighting the company's advantages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useSubmitLead` mutation hook that calls the backend `submitLead` method with lead form data and invalidates the leads query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts (Montserrat, Inter), sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and declares utility classes and keyframe animations (e.g., banner-shimmer).
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider (React Query) and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color palettes (solar, charcoal, and semantic tokens), Montserrat/Inter font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for TRI-GITA SERVICES tracking existing features (subsidy animations, footer address, service area) and pending action requests, along with schema versioning and architectural notes.
